User.title: User Profile
User.description: Document mapping unique student, teacher, or admin demographics, preferences, and roles.

id.description: Matches the authenticated user's unique Firebase UID.

email.description: Verified correspondence email address of user.

classLevel.description: Class standard from Primary 1 to SS 3.

selectedSubjectIds.description: A list of selected subject standard IDs.

role.description: Current authorization layer standard in the RBAC hierarchy.

schoolName.description: Name of primary academic institution enrolled in.

LessonProgress.title: Lesson Progress Tracker
LessonProgress.description: Stores state of student's progress and quiz scores across terms and subject units.

ContactMessage.title: LMS Contact Query
ContactMessage.description: Submitted help tickets or correspondence from students, teachers, or parents.

TeacherClassSetup.title: Teacher Classroom and Scores
TeacherClassSetup.description: Stores current classroom structures, student reports, test marks and attendance data for a teacher.

students.description: Holds nested students, including cumulative assessment scoring and attendance history maps.

AIExam.title: AI Computer Based Test
AIExam.description: Dynamic custom examination papers generated using AI modules, saved for class execution.

PushSubscription.title: Push Subscription Details
PushSubscription.description: FCM device registration token mapping for notifications.

users/{userId}.description: User profiles, accessible by the authenticated user or an administrator.

lessonProgress/{progressId}.description: Tracks progress. Authenticated users write their own progress, read their own history.

contactMessages/{messageId}.description: Correspondence messages securely posted by any user, read strictly by admins or back-offices.

teacherSetups/{setupId}.description: Academic roster and report records managed by teachers.

aiExams/{examId}.description: Custom educational exams editable by teachers and admins, retrievable by active students.
